title: Real-Time Data Collection System
description: A mid-sized bus company needed to improve on-time performance across multiple routes.
problem: Delays in data collection led to late buses and poor service reliability.
solution: Designed and implemented a real-time data collection workflow using AppSheet and SQL.
content:
## Overview
A mid-sized bus company needed to improve on-time performance across multiple routes.

## Problem
Delays in data collection led to late buses and poor service reliability.

## Solution
Designed and implemented a real-time data collection workflow using AppSheet and SQL.

## Tech Stack
- AppSheet
- SQL
- Google Sheets

## Results
Reduced average delay from 5-10 minutes to under 5 minutes on all routes.
